name: S-3 --flag-orphan-rules exits non-zero when a rule cites a source not in the standards catalog
command:
mkdir -p tree/g && printf '
rules:
  - {id: r, provenance: [{source: not-in-catalog, section_id: "1.1"}]}
' > tree/g/x.yaml && printf -- '- id: g
  name: G
  url: x
  tier: 1
  applies_to: [x]
  fetch_frequency: daily
' > catalog.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/build-coverage-matrix.sh" --tree tree --catalog catalog.yaml --flag-orphan-rules 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 1 ] && grep -q 'not-in-catalog' err.txt && echo flagged 1>&2
